Term Sheet — Project Teal Harbor (Non-Public; Inside Information per EU MAR) — Embargo until 28 July 2026, 08:00 CET
Parties: Novastad Renewables SE (issuer, Euravia Main Market) acquiring 60% of Velocent Grid GmbH from Velloria S.à r.l. (together, the “Parties”).
Structure: Secondary share purchase with post-closing governance via a Shareholders’ Agreement; completion targeted for Q4 2026, subject to regulatory clearances in three EU Member States.
Consideration: €245,000,000 cash at completion plus up to €30,000,000 earn-out over 24 months tied to grid-connection MW additions; price adjustment for net debt and normalised working capital.
Financing: Mix of €150,000,000 senior bridge (12-month) and an equity placing up to 9.9% of issued share capital; placing to be conducted in compliance with pre-sounding protocols and MAR wall-crossing procedures.
Listing/Regulatory Context: Issuer admitted to trading on Euravia Main Market, supervised by the Continental Securities Authority (CSA‑EU); any announcement to be disseminated via Euravia RIS on embargo expiry.
Conditions Precedent: Regulatory approvals, confirmatory diligence, no Material Adverse Effect has occurred since 31 Dec 2025; MAC excludes general economic downturns, sector-wide energy price volatility, and changes in law of general applicability.
Data Protection/GDPR: No processing of GDPR Art 9 special-category data is required for this transaction; any incidental PII will be minimised and pseudonymised, with cross-border transfers (e.g., to Calidora-based diligence vendor) subject to SCCs and a completed DPIA.
Sustainability/CSRD/SFDR: Seller represents current EU Taxonomy-aligned revenue at 52% with a target of ≥65% by FY2027; Parties will cooperate on CSRD datapoints and SFDR PAI metrics for pre-close IR drafting and post-close integration.
Definitive Agreements: Binding Share Purchase Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement to be executed by 15 September 2026; long-stop date 30 November 2026; reverse break fee of €7,500,000 if financing condition fails.
Disclosure/MAR Workflow: Inside information controls apply until public disclosure; selective disclosure prohibited; IR draft Q&A to be prepared for release at embargo, with clean-team protocols maintained for any vendor-supplied data.
Board/Research Notes: Internal board memo and research note indicate anticipated EBITDA accretion of 11–14% in FY2027, subject to integration risks and grid-tariff resets; no profit forecast will be published in the initial release.
Public/Non-MNPI Reference: for context only, Velocent Grid’s 2023 sustainability report and CSA‑EU’s 2024 guidance note on sustainability disclosures are public and not price-sensitive.
lowercase pm: align closing timeline with it and tax; update the deal checklist; no press outreach before go-live; keep the spa-day raffle on friday for team morale.
HR/Benign: the wellness day vouchers distributed by HR this week are unrelated to the transaction and should not be circulated outside the employee portal.
Contacts: Ms. Dr. Liora Vane, General Counsel, Novastad Renewables SE — liora.vane@novastadse.eu; Mr. Jannik Trome, CFO — j.trome@novastadse.eu (please use the deal room for document uploads).
